text: I feel as if I have entered a sanctuary of ideas—a space dedicated to thought and invention. The clean glass, colorful information, and the scientific air awaken in me a sense of curiosity and humility. My mind dwells on the tension between human creativity and our efforts to formalize it—research, development, and discovery, all converging here. I feel the urge to question and to learn, to see where my own place is among these currents of innovation and reflection.
